_comment_licensing: The ODA spec text and PDF are copyrighted 'All rights reserved / RESTRICTED RIGHTS' with no redistribution grant. They are DEVELOPER-LOCAL, gitignored, and referenced only by sha256 pin below. Only the pin (this file) is committed. See round3 Appendix R.1.
_comment_regeneration: The spec text is generated from the source PDF via: pdftotext -layout <pdf> libraries/libdxfrw/spec/dwg_spec.txt. Identity assertions the P0 gate verifies: exactly 14992 lines and sed -n '10471p' startswith '20.4.75 HATCH'.

spec_pdf.description: ODA 'Open Design Specification for .dwg files', v5.4.1

autocad_dxf_reference_pdf.note: DXF T1 authority (Appendix B). Pin populated when P4 begins.

ezdxf.note: L7 correction: version + git rev-parse must both match. Pin verified by dump_ezdxf_codes.py at run time.

gate_branches.note: Round-3 H3 mapping. Covers all 23 gate strings observed in spec_fields.json. Branch-cell denominator computed: 7807 (compares to round-3 A.9 estimate 4000-6000; the higher value reflects Common-gate rows spanning all 7 branches).
